5214baa2dc5c0cd6a18f25e14e88c4cf.webp:
1. Very beautiful colors being used.
2. The info-graphic style mixed with hand drawn asthetic pops.
3. The name "Fire Island Pines" with the light house and beach/ocean asthetic pulls people in.
FgAQNWsUAAUyHpS.jpg: The Gradient in the BG is very nice with the black-green scheme. The name alpha-bot for an NFT thing is well thought. The minted cards for the NFTs as well are thought well.
GVfKvjAWcAAhjtX.jpg: The Noise in the background is a very nice touch along with a gradient with the colours white,yellow,red,black and blue is very nice to stare at all day. The deformed A is a nice touch with a (R) on top. The Gradient also seems to be slightly softened
HHews1Ra8AA7sIy.jpg:
This is a very nice paper page. BG is a paper with texture on it and the right side has some text for it as well. "Built for serious firms" siginifies use of AI along with the name Axiom, Statue of liberty on the right bottom is a very nice touch.
Touche
HHews1YbkAAVod0.jpg: The Axiom typography is very well done, Artifical Intelligence for Government Relations is also a good feild with the atom diagram on the top left. Paper BG with texture is also good.
HHews1gasAAU4Mb.jpg: The Axiom typography with a bigger Golden Logo is also a good touch with a paper BG and texture with minimal text
HHewsSva0AAy0PC.jpg: Axiom logo with an eagle + Blue textured BG is well made. A pill for the eagle and bold text on top. Simple and very elegant
HNaktgFXgAAP2ZO.jpg: This is a full design doc with everything needed for the company "Bird". A race car hero page and a man running for "How it works page" shows a race-ish aesthetic. The rainbow BG for all the hero images is also very good looking. Could stare at it all day
HNp21I_XEAAvn8b.jpg: A simple brand with a light blue BG and 2 boxes that looks like mountains inside the boxes with simple text saying "Core intelligence system" and "Engineered for the next layer of software" are well thought.
Living signal-4096x4096.png: A simple shape in pink colour and White BG. Simple image for BG use.
Open heart-4096x4096.png: A heart in pink-orange gradient and white BG is a nice touch. Useful for BG images or backdrops.
Untitled blend-1920x1080.png: A image showing mountains and a sun with Blue-orange-white colours. Useful for a footer page since its a very calm image
Untitled blend-3840x2160.png: A ocean in blue,red and white colours with the words "Epoch AI Labs" is a nice calm image useful for launch stuff.
